content.rendered:
Rail-Based Public Transit Systems

Our Services Includes:
  • Traffic surveys and travel demand forecasts/ridership estimates
  • Alternative analysis
  • Selection of technology and alignment
  • System specifications
  • Passenger amenities and facilities development plans
  • Operational plans
  • Environmental and social impact assessments (ESIAs)
  • Cost estimation
  • Project structuring
  • Financial and economic analysis
  • Implementation planning and capacity building
Representative Projects
Rail Systems
  • Feasibility Study and Detailed Project Report for Delhi-Alwar Corridor of the Regional Rapid Transit System (RRTS for the National Capital Region (NCR))
  • Patronage and revenue forecasting consultancy services, for the purpose of bidding, proposed high-speed rail link project to the Bangalore International Airport (BIAL)- Bangalore
  • Feasibility Study for rail-based public transport systems in New Town- Kolkata
  • Commuter Assessment and Pre-Feasibility Study for Proposed Metro Rail- Lucknow
  • Kochi Alternative Analysis Report and Revision of Detailed Project Report
  • Land Value Capturing Study for Delhi Meerut RRTS Corridor
  • Study for provision of last mile connectivity to and from metro stations falling in NCT of Delhi
  • Traffic Management Plan at “Critical Sections of Ghaziabad & Modinagar” for Traffic Management during construction for Delhi- Ghaziabad- Meerut RRTS Corridor
  • Alternative Analysis Report and Updating of Existing DPR including Economic Analysis, Multi-Modal Integration and TOD-VCF for Phase III – Aluva to Angamaly
  • Alternative Analysis Study for Dehradun Metro
  • Ridership Assessment for Lucknow Metro
  • Preparation of Alternative Analysis Report (AAR) and Detailed Project Report (DPR) for Pune MRTS Phase-2
  • Preparation of Detailed Project Report (DPR) for Metro Neo 2.0 on identified routes of Navi Mumbai Metro Line-2, 3 & 4
  • Preparation of Techno Economic Feasibility and DPR for Durgadi (Kalyan) to Ulhasnagar (Metro Line-5C)
  • AAR and DPR for entire Mumbai Metro Line-8 (CSMIA – NMIA)
  • DPR for Extension of Navi Mumbai Metro Line-1 from Pendhar to MIDC
Project Appraisals
  • Detailed Project Report for Badarpur-Faridabad Metro- NCR
  • Detailed Project Report for Delhi Metro Dwarka Sec-21 to IGI Metro Link, Extension Jahangirpuri – Badli, Phase III, Extension Rithala – Bawana
  • Bid Documentation for Airport Metro Link for Bangalore International Airport (BIAL)- Bangalore
  • Detailed Project Report for East-West Corridor of Kolkata Metro- Kolkata
  • Detailed Project Report for metro projects in Chennai, Jaipur, Kochi, Bengaluru, Ludhiana, Nagpur, Lucknow, Ahmedabad and Pune
  • Detailed Project Report for Rapid Metro Gurgaon – Sikanderpur to Mall of India
  • Manual with specifications and standards for Hyderabad Metro Railway- Hyderabad
